title: Creating, accessing and modifying custom object in monday.com
excerpt:
Hi All, 
Is there any way to add custom object along with it’s structure other than using predefined objects in monday.com? 
Also, is there any way to add custom columns in the board other than predefined types? 
Regards…

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Is there any way to add custom object along with it’s structure other than using predefined objects in monday.com?

Also, is there any way to add custom columns in the board other than predefined types?

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @prasmadd and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can use custom fields for this!

Is that what you were looking for?

Regarding the custom column, which type of column were you thinking of? What would the use case be?

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday

Thank you for inputs. As per my understanding we can add columns with the types mentioned in the set in API documentation but is there anyway that we can add column with other type which is not part of that list.

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @prasmadd!

What type would that be? What are you trying to achieve with that custom column?
